title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Nami as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who's there?! Who was it that hurled a hammer at me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyway, the devil fruit-I need to-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta be kidding me! There's no way that thing is that heavy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the deal with this castle?! Has it become decrepit?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one has been able to eat it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...but with the powers I have now...

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
